General.Name: Vistar Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Vistar Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides electrical and mechanical engineering services in Hong Kong. It operates through three segments: Installation Services, Alteration and Addition Works, and Maintenance Services. The company offers installation, alteration, addition, repair, and maintenance works of fire service systems. Vistar Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Chai Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tak King Industrial Building, Chai Wan, Hong Kong
